title: calea scabra
intro: Calea scabra, also known as Mexican mint or scabrida, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Calea scabra has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce a state of calmness and relaxation. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting sleep, and alleviating digestive issues. Calea scabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
